_comment: Token factory registry — Base mainnet (chain id 8453). Maps deployer / factory / router / fee-wallet addresses to launchpads. Read by Judgement Agent in Step 1 for factory detection. Unknown → UNVERIFIED_LAUNCH.
_detection_priority: 1) Match token deployer / factory address against factories[].deployer_addresses. 2) For Bankr/Noice (no own factory): match fee_wallet as beneficiary in Doppler Lock event data, OR Bankr router as fn_caller on Clanker. 3) Unknown → UNVERIFIED_LAUNCH.

factories.name: clanker
factories.notes: Check factory_fees_claimed via Clanker API. Claimed = active creator. Unclaimed >7d = possible bot/abandoned.

factories.name: bankr
factories.platform_history: Pre-2026-02-10: built on top of Clanker V4. Post-2026-02-10: built on top of Doppler.
factories.detection_method: Bankr router (0x2112...3F9) as fn_caller on Clanker, OR Bankr fee_wallet (0xF606...163e) as beneficiary in Doppler Lock event data.
factories.notes: No own factory contract. Identifies via router (Clanker era) or fee-wallet beneficiary (Doppler era).

factories.name: doppler
factories.notes: Underlying protocol used by Bankr (post-2026-02-10) and Noice. Different initialisers correspond to different curve/pool types. To disambiguate downstream platform (raw Doppler vs Bankr vs Noice), inspect beneficiary in Lock event.

factories.name: noice
factories.detection_method: Match Noice fee_wallet (0xfbDb...1CdF) as beneficiary in Doppler Lock event data.
factories.notes: No own factory. Sits on top of Doppler initialisers. Identifies via fee-wallet beneficiary.

factories.name: flaunch
factories.detection_method: Uniswap V4 PositionManager hooks. fn_caller = tx_signer = evt_tx_from in *_evt_poolcreated. No router intermediary.
factories.notes: Multiple PositionManager versions active simultaneously — match any. Pool counts are point-in-time; addresses are stable.

factories.name: virtuals
factories.notes: AI agent token factory. EIP-1967 proxy → BondingV2 implementation. Bonding curve launch mechanic.
